subcodes.first_line: O Aflatun, whose name hath become renowned throughout all regions, distinguished and acclaimed for illumined wisdom, thou art the cause of triumph [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افلاطون همنامت شهره آفاق شد و بحکمت اشراق معروف و ممتاز گشت داناای سبب فوز
subcodes.subjects: @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @high station of the arts and sciences
